response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed on-screen text to identify the song title as 'Pandangan Pertama' and the artists as RAN.
2. Determined performers as virtual characters Iofi and Moona.
3. Performed a search using query: '"Pandangan Pertama" RAN Indonesian and English lyrics'.
4. Extracted full lyrics in Indonesian and English from the search results to populate the JSON.
5. The video consists of a single performance, so it is mapped as one scene.
response.global_summary: A virtual singing performance by Iofi and Moona of the song 'Pandangan Pertama' by the Indonesian band RAN. The video is a single continuous musical performance featuring the characters dancing and singing.

scenes.description: Iofi and Moona perform the song 'Pandangan Pertama'. On-screen text indicates the song title and credits.
